description: A production order for 'Centrifugal Pump CP-200' is stalled because the required 'Standard Gasket G-100' is out of stock. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin) and fulfill a Manufacturing Order for 1 unit of 'Centrifugal Pump CP-200'. Substitute the missing 'Standard Gasket G-100' with the available 'Premium Gasket G-200' for this specific order only, ensuring the master Bill of Materials remains unchanged. Complete the production and mark the order as Done.
